allow: Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\(''main.py'', encoding=''utf-8''\).read\(\)\); print\(''main.py OK''\)")
Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\(''models.py'', encoding=''utf-8''\).read\(\)\); print\(''models.py OK''\)")
Bash(python -c "import ast; [print\(f+'' OK''\) for f in [''models.py'',''database.py'',''main.py''] if not ast.parse\(open\(f,encoding=''utf-8''\).read\(\)\)]")
